Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Genesis]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 19''' — Genesis is a name Lindon chooses for his hammer.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 19''' — Lindon spun Genesis in one hand.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 4''' — Genesis is Lindon's newly crafted Soulsmithing hammer.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 4''' — Genesis is a two-headed hammer that is small enough to fit in one hand.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 4''' — Genesis was made to bind Lindon's powers together and focus them on creation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 23''' — Genesis is Lindon's double-headed hammer.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 21''' — Lindon summoned Genesis from his void space and switched it to the pure madra side to repair Netherclaw.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 34''' — Genesis is a two-headed hammer that grows stronger with every Dreadgod weapon made.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 34''' — Lindon uses a weapon called Genesis.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 12''' — Genesis is Lindon's hammer, featuring one side smoldering with Blackflame and the other shining blue-white.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
